title: Audit a change for unsafe money arithmetic
description: Inspect a diff for float money types, missing currency, non-idempotent charges, and in-place balance mutation, reporting each with its risk.
body: Use when reviewing code that handles monetary values. Actions: scan for float/double money fields, arithmetic that loses precision, money compared or added without a currency, charge paths lacking an idempotency key, and balance columns updated in place rather than via ledger entries; report each finding with location and the safer pattern. Do not approve a money path that mutates balances without an audit trail. This skill exposes capability only and must not alter financial code or data without runtime permission. Validation signals include a findings list mapping each issue to a fix and tests covering precision and idempotency. Risk boundary: advisory only; flag money-movement and balance-mutation risks for human review and never recommend relaxing approval or audit controls to ship faster.
